articles.title: Netflix delays Greta Gerwig’s ‘Narnia’ movie for big theatrical push in 2027
articles.description: "The Magician's Nephew" looks like a big next step in Netflix's thawing relationship with movie theaters.

articles.title: Brazil's central bank bans stablecoin and crypto settlement in cross-border payments
articles.description: The ban applies to fintechs and payment firms, closing the back-end payment rail for cross-border flows, but individual crypto investors can still buy and hold assets.

articles.title: Crypto industry backs CLARITY Act yield compromise, pushes Senate Banking for markup
articles.description: The agreement necessitates firms restructure reward programs from a "buy and hold" to a "buy and use" model; however, CCI raised concerns over its broad prohibition.

articles.title: Bitcoin's 'hazardous' airdrop: Why developers are warning against Paul Sztorc’s eCash fork
articles.description: Developers and industry figures say the eCash proposal introduces user risk, uneven distribution and philosophical tension.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

articles.title: Beyond Lovable and Mistral: 21 European startups to watch
articles.description: It is not that European startups never get attention — Lovable and Mistral AI are proof of that. But there are many more that insiders are tracking.

articles.title: A16z sides with CFTC against states seeking to ban prediction markets
articles.description: Venture capital firm a16z argues that state crackdowns on platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket conflict with federal law and hurt market access for ordinary users.

articles.title: The $292M crypto hack exposed DeFi's weak spots. Here’s what must change, insiders say
articles.description: As Wall Street moves onchain, the year's biggest crypto hack and DeFi crisis is forcing a rethink of risk, security and market structure, industry insiders told CoinDesk.

articles.title: Prediction markets are ditching the 'casino' label to become a regular part of how people track the news
articles.description: A new report from Bitget and Polymarket reveals that prediction markets are evolving into a $240 billion industry driven by retail users who are trading more frequently on everything from crypto to politics.

articles.title: Riot posts $167M in Q1 revenue as data center arm pulls in $33M in first quarter
articles.description: Riot Platforms reported $167.2 million in Q1 2026 revenue, with its new data center business contributing $33.2 million as Bitcoin mining income fell.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation sells another 10,000 ETH to BitMine in third OTC deal
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation has now sold roughly $47 million worth of ETH to BitMine in a week, drawing fresh criticism over the pace and scale of its sales.

articles.title: Bitcoin mining stocks climb in 2026 as BTC lags behind
articles.description: All major mining stocks are up in 2026, with gains of up to 85% as Bitcoin remains down on the year.

articles.title: Bitcoin above $78,000 as Senate clears Clarity Act yield hurdle, S&P 500 sets new record
articles.description: Bitcoin recovered from a midweek dip to $75,500 to climb back above $78,000 by Saturday morning in Asia, with the Senate's stablecoin yield compromise removing a key roadblock to crypto market structure legislation.
